title: Chuck E Cheese: Back To The Bots
description: Have you heard the news? Chuck E Cheese's world came to minecraft for the first time in java edition!
body:
![mod chuck next to the mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62a603fa37137410e516cecd5530daee87c39c59.png)
**Chuck E Cheese: Back To The Bots** is an unfinished mod that will bring Chuck E Cheese's world to Minecraft for the first time in java. _This mod is a Management Wanted addon_


_In this mod you will find:_ 
- All of CEC's bots🤖
- CEC arts🖼️
- Stage's decoration⭐
- CEC's sign
- Arcade games🕹️

**Now is your time to build your own Chuck E Cheese!**
